title: MochaTrade raises funding to offer global access to US perpetual futures
summary: MochaTrade raised pre-seed funding from Y Combinator and Pioneer Fund to build a regulated platform offering perpetual futures on US stocks, indices and commodities. The app aims to simplify global access, enabling leveraged trading with real-time settlement and broader market participation

title: Brigade Enterprises reports FY26 net profit at Rs 725 cr, approves 1:3 bonus issue
summary: Brigade Enterprises posted higher annual profit and 11% revenue growth driven by strong real estate pre-sales, leasing gains and hospitality expansion. Despite a weaker quarterly profit, robust sales momentum, improved realisations and strong cash flows support a positive business outlook

title: Home First Finance profit surges 43% on strong AUM growth
summary: Home First Finance reported a 43% rise in Q4 profit to Rs 150 crore driven by strong business expansion and 25% AUM growth. Operating profit and income also rose sharply, while asset quality remained stable and dividend payout was increased significantly

title: Shree Cement profit dips as costs rise and demand outlook weakens
summary: Shree Cement reported an 8% fall in Q4 profit due to rising costs, despite higher revenue and volumes. Elevated fuel expenses and geopolitical risks weighed on margins, while monsoon uncertainty and West Asia tensions pose short-term growth challenges for the sector

title: Sun Pharma, 5 stocks hit 52-week highs, rally up to 25% in a month
